shipping.policy: Hamari delivery pure Pakistan mein Rs. 250 hai. 5000 se upar ki shopping par delivery bilkul free hai.
shipping.time: Bade shehron mein 2-3 din, jabke door daraz ilaqon mein 5-7 working days lagte hain.
shipping.tracking: Order ship hone ke baad aapko SMS ke zariye tracking ID bhej di jati hai.

returns_refunds.policy: Aap 7 dino ke andar product return ya exchange kar sakte hain agar wo original packing mein ho.
returns_refunds.refund_time: Refund process mein 48-72 ghante lagte hain jab humein product wapas mil jata hai.
returns_refunds.conditions: Used items ya damaged packaging wale products return nahi honge.

privacy_policy.data_usage: Hum aapka data sirf order processing aur behtar user experience ke liye istemal karte hain.
privacy_policy.security: Aapka data SSL encryption ke zariye mehfooz rakha jata hai.
privacy_policy.cookies: Hum website ki performance behtar karne ke liye cookies use karte hain.

contact.address: Lumiere Fashion House, Gulberg III, Lahore, Pakistan
contact.timing: Hum Monday se Saturday, subah 9 baje se sham 6 baje tak dastyab hain.

about.brand: Lumiere ek premium fashion brand hai jo high-quality kapde aur accessories faraham karta hai.
about.mission: Hamara maqsad fashion ko sab ke liye asaan aur mayari banana hai.
